case_title: AUSDALL, DICK VAN C/O KING & KELLEHER, LLP VS PRINCIPAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $168.00 FILED BY AUSDALL, DICK VAN C/O KING & KELLEHER, LLP AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCIPAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUSDALL, DICK VAN C/O KING & KELLEHER, LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRINCIPAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY $168.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $188.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCIPAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY
